subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the Lote-Tree beyond which there is no passing proclaimeth, and all things cry out from beyond it: "The Lord of Names is come!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه تنادی سدره المنتهی و تنادی الاشیاء عن ورائها قد اتی مالک الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
